name: Jason Turner
summary: Former USS Princeton crew member who has publicly described viewing a longer version of video associated with the 2004 Nimitz encounter.
profileSummary: Former USS Princeton crew member who has publicly described viewing a longer version of video associated with the 2004 Nimitz encounter.
background: Former U.S. Navy crew member aboard USS Princeton.
inclusionNote: Included because of his named public account concerning shipboard video and post-event handling. The longer-video account has not been independently established through a released official copy.
